blocks: ## Are We In the End Times?
A brief white paper outlining a human  oppression scenario involving artificial superintelligence and how one might prepare for such a miserable tribulation
Jared Brock Contact: www.jaredbrock.com
This paper is free to share with others.
## Table of Contents
' You will be hated by all for my name's sake. But the one who endures to the end will be saved .' - Mark 13:13
## Introduction
My  grandfather,  whom  I  adored  more  than  anyone  on  earth,  was  absolutely, completely, and totally convinced that Jesus would return in his lifetime.
As a boy, I scoffed at sweet old church people who believed we were living in the last days.
Now I'm all grown up (supposedly).
I'm  still  not  a  'the  end  is  nigh!'  guy,  but  lately  I've  been  mulling  much  about artificial superintelligence and the end of humanity.
The  technological  tidal  wave  that's  smashing  our  shores  is  genuinely  new;  a technology never seen before in recorded human history.

In the  U.K.,  the  corporate  establishment  just  announced  nationwide  facial recognition  and  mandatory  digital  ID, saying people won't be legally allowed to work without it, and hinting that childcare and healthcare will be tied to it as well.

There's  also  been  huge  development  on  wrist  chips,  microneedle  tattoos,  and quantum dot tattoos that deliver copper-based nanocrystals that store data in your skin. (Do I even need to mention that Bill Gates is one of the funders?)
My hope in this piece is to see if we can't come up with some sort of prediction for where the next fifteen years might take us, and how we could prepare for it.

I  realize  that  many  thousands  of  my  readers  are  not  Christians,  but  they're  an inquisitive bunch who will be curious to see what various Christians believe about the end of the world as we know it.
## What is the Book of Revelation?

Roughly 1,930 years ago (around 95-96 AD), a Christian named John is exiled to the  Greek  island  of  Patmos  during  the  persecutions  of  the  Roman  emperor Domitian.  Jesus  sends  His  personal  angel  to  John  and  gets  John  to  write  down what  he  sees.  Christians  throughout  history  have  considered  this  a  genuine revelation to John by Jesus, which is why the final book in the library of Scripture is called the Revelation .
First-century-John does his best to describe what he sees, but one wonders if some sections aren't a real glimpse of the future.

Is the Antichrist actually some form of artificial intelligence? Is the mark of the beast actually a quantum technology? Is that a nuclear detonation in Revelation 8:8-9? Is that a bioterror weapon in Revelation 8:10-11? Are those robot soldiers in Revelation 9:7-9? Is that a helicopter or drone fleet in Revelation 9:9-10?
More on all of this shortly.
## 'History doesn't repeat itself, but it rhymes.'
People in every generation believed they were living in the last days.
What can we know for certain?
That  no  one  but  God  the  Father  knows  the  hour  or  the  day, not  even  Jesus . (Matthew 24:36)
Christ will return like a thief in the night.

Paul writes in 1 Thessalonians 5:1-4, 'Now concerning the times and the seasons, brothers, you have no need to have anything written to you. For you yourselves are fully  aware  that  the  day  of  the  Lord  will  come  like  a  thief  in  the  night.  While people are saying, 'There is peace and security,' then sudden destruction will come upon them as labor pains come upon a pregnant woman, and they will not escape. But you are not in darkness, brothers, for that day to surprise you like a thief.'
## There will be signs.

Christians basically all agree there will be a second coming/return of Jesus after a horrific  seven-year  tribulation (called The Great Tribulation, more in a minute), but they're split on when Christians get to take leave of Earth and teleport to the heavenly dimension (called The Rapture):

- Pre-tribbers believe Christians will be raptured before the Tribulation.
- Mid-tribbers  believe  Christians  will  be  raptured  halfway  through  the Tribulation.
- Post-tribbers believe Jesus will come to collect all the Christians at the end of the Tribulation.
My father calls himself a pan-tribulationist: 'God's going to make it all pan out.'
What most Christians are missing is that John's apocalyptic vision recorded in the book of Revelation is not a logical, linear, progressive, beginning-middle-and-end Western book.
The real reason there's so much hullabaloo over the chronological sequence of the Revelation is that the Revelation is probably not a chronological story .
My  theologian  friend  Richard  John  Saunders:  'Revelation  is  likely  a  prophetic loop - the events portrayed are the same events over and over.'
G.  K.  Beale,  in  his New  International  Greek  Testament  Commentary  on  The  Book of Revelation , points out five of these loops:

- Loop #1: Revelation 6:12-17 and Revelation 7:9-17
- Loop #2: Revelation 11:18a and Revelation 11:18b
- Loop #3: Revelation 14:14-20 and Revelation 15:2-4
- Loop #4: Revelation 16:17-21; Revelation 17:1-18:24; and Revelation 19:1-10
- Loop #5: Revelation 20:7-15 and Revelation 21:1-8 and Revelation 21:9-22:5
Stunningly, the loops all follow the same pattern:

1. Spirits with free wills (humans, Satan-Devil, angels, demons,  devils, anti-christs,  etc)  rebel  against  the  word,  will,  and  way  of  God  and  cause damage to themselves, others, and creation.
2. God judges them for their sin.
3. God saves a remnant of faithful and resilient Christians.
Repeat.
Even  non-Christians  have  a  deeply intuitive sense of this rebellion - judgment salvation cycle:

- In  his  book The  Changing  World  Order:  Why  Nations  Succeed  and  Fail , billionaire  hedge-fund  founder  Ray  Dalio  describes  a  'Big  Cycle'  of  new order,  peace  and  prosperity,  inequality  and  debt,  bubbles  and  crises, depression and revolution.
- Or perhaps you've heard the quote attributed to G. Michael Hopf in Those Who  Remain:  'Hard  times  create  strong  men.  Strong  men  create  good times. Good times create weak men. And, weak men create hard times.'
We're currently in the warning/remnant-building phase of the rebellion -judgment - renewal cycle.
The Revelation describes this cycle like the pangs of childbirth.
The cycles become more and more intense with each round of contractions.
Loop #4 is the most intense judgment in the cycles.
Loop #5 is the most intense salvation in the cycles.
Female contraction pangs end with the delivery of a baby. So  too  will  God  eventually  end  the  rebellion-judgment-salvation  cycle  with the deliverance of an entirely new reality.

Is the Revelation applicable to the Roman Empire? Absolutely. Is it applicable to the British Empire? Yep. The American empire? For sure. The rising Chinese empire? Correct. The Nation of Islam? You bet your bottom petro-dollar. The global finance corporatocracy? Without a doubt. The  fast-approaching  Artificial  Superintelligence  Empire?  It  won't  be  the  first
exception.

God brooks zero rebellion, whether it comes from north, south, east, or west. From ancient  Assyria  to  the  near-future,  corporate-controlled,  AI-policed,  neo-feudal colonies,  judgment  is  the  natural  consequence  of  sin.  But  God,  in  His  mercy, always  preserves  a  faithful  remnant  to  rise  like  a  phoenix  from  the  ashes  of desolation.

The  lesson  for  us  is  that  the  Revelation  isn't  just  a  vision  of  the  future:  It's  a glimpse  of  multiple  pasts, multiple presents, and multiple futures that explicitly inform how Christians are to live for God in all times and places.
## Where should we stand on the rapture of Christians?
I hope that Jesus picks me up tomorrow and whisks me off to paradise, and that the whole seven-year Great Tribulation is just a spiritual metaphor for everyone who is left behind.
But  as  my  Mama  always  says,  'Pray  for  the  best,  prepare  for  the worst, and be grateful for whatever God gives.'

Wisdom dictates each generation should prepare for the worst-case scenario - no rapture,  no  literal  millennium,  and  Christ's  return/second  coming after the greatest of literal, physically painful, seven-year tribulations.

It  would  be  irresponsible  for  us  to  teach  Christians  that  it's  just  a  spiritual metaphor and/or they'll all be beamed up to heaven Star Trek-style, running the risk  of  leaving  them  woefully  unprepared  and  unprotected  for  what might very well be faith-shattering chaos, sickness, disease, war, persecution, enslavement, and murder. Isn't that part of 'counting the cost of discipleship' to Jesus?
Jesus warns us in Matthew 24:12-13 that, '…because lawlessness will be increased, the love of many will grow cold.' We want to stoke a red-hot faith that can burn brighter than any fiery trial.

Jesus  talks  about  knowing  the  signs  of  the  times  constantly  (Matthew  16:2-3, Matthew  24:32-33,  Luke  12:54-56,  Matthew  24:42-44). It's  vital  that  Christians remember,  understand,  and  intuitively  grasp  the  signs  of  the  times  and  the Revelation  judgments  so  that,  should  they  be  blessed  to  endure  the  Great Tribulation,  they  can  confidently  say,  ' These  are  signs.  This  is  all  happening  on purpose. This is part of God's plan. I can trust Him. He is sovereign. With His Holy Spirit I can endure to the end .'

So, regardless of our eschatological position , let's be doom maximalists and, for the sake of  this  spiritual  preparation  exercise,  let's  expect  and  prepare  for  the  absolute worst - that  Christians  will  indeed  have  to  endure  every  wretched  second  of  a literal, physical, worst-possible seven-year Great Tribulation.
Perhaps we really are entering the beginning of the final  birth  pang - but at the very least , can we all agree that we are likely entering a birth pang?
We  need  to  become  and  raise  up  spiritual  warrior-survivors,  not  untrained, weaponless, cannon fodder.
The purpose of this essay is to outline a possible end-of-days/end-of-time scenario for our generation, and consider how we might prepare for a miserable tribulation.
Let's call it The Birthpang Survival Guide .
## The Great Tribulation
Here's the worst-case, literal, physical reading of the seven-year Great Tribulation in Revelation, dished out over three rounds of seven judgments apiece:
## 1/3.) Seven seal judgments
John  sees  a  scroll.  The  scroll has seven seals on it. There is a lamb (Jesus). Every time the Jesus-lamb opens a seal, it unleashes something on humanity.
## Seal Judgment #1 (Revelation 6:2):
Extremely speculatively, the arrival of a beastly Antichrist entity. (Nascent AGI?)
## Seal Judgment #2 (Revelation 6:4):
A breakdown of peace/law and order leading to much war and murder.
## Seal Judgment #3 (Revelation 6:5-6):
Hyperinflation.
## Seal Judgment #4 (Revelation 6:8):
A  quarter  of  the  earth  faces  war/murder,  famine,  pestilence/disease,  and  wild beasts.
## Seal Judgment #5 (Revelation 6:9-11):
Many Christians are slaughtered. (Obviously this is nothing new - Christians are the most persecuted people group on the planet.)
## Seal Judgment #6 (Revelation 6:12-17):

A huge earthquake. The sun is blacked out and the moon appears red (perhaps by the  earthquake?  Pollution?  Geo-engineering  in  the  name  of  global  warming?) Asteroids hit the earth (or falling satellites? or nukes?) and obliterate mountains and islands. The rich and powerful hide in underground bunkers, while the poor hide in caves, many begging for death.
## Seal Judgment #7 (Revelation 8:1-5):
A massive thunder and lightning storm, and another major earthquake.
The birthpangs are getting more intense. Immediately following the opening of the seventh judgment seal, John sees seven angelic trumpeters:
## 2/3.) Seven trumpet judgments
## Trumpet Judgment #1 (Revelation 8:7):
'Hail  and  fire  mixed  with  blood'  rain  down  on  earth.  (Comets?  Asteroids? Satellites? Missiles?)
A third of the earth, trees, and grasslands are burned up.
## Trumpet Judgment #2 (Revelation 8:8-9):

'Something like a great mountain, burning with fire, was thrown into the sea. A third of the sea became blood. A third of the living creatures in the sea died, and a third of the ships were destroyed.'
Is  this  the  long-overdue  Yellowstone  volcano  finally  popping  off?  A  massive asteroid? Meteor? Volcanic debris? Nuclear weapon(s) attacking a nuclear submarine or warship fleet?
Space debris could release iron oxide or chemicals, reddening the water.
Shockwaves and tsunamis could easily kill marine life and sink ships.
Lava or ash from a supervolcano could contaminate the sea.
Any of these could trigger a red tide (harmful algal bloom).
## Trumpet Judgment #3 (Revelation 8:10-11):

'A  great  star  fell  from  heaven,  blazing like a torch, and it fell on a third of the rivers and on the springs of water. The name of the star is Wormwood. A third of the waters became wormwood, and many people died from the water, because it had been made bitter.'
Bioterror weapon poisoning freshwater?
## Trumpet Judgment #4 (Revelation 8:12):
A third of the sun/moon/stars are blocked/kept from shining.
## Trumpet Judgment #5 (Revelation 9:1-12):
An  underground  vault/lab/factory  releases  scorpion-like  'locusts'  in  a  plume  of smoke.

They sound an awful lot like robotic drone soldiers - they are described as looking like  war  horses  with  golden  crowns  and  breastplates  of  iron, human faces, long hair,  sharp  teeth,  wings  that  sound  like  drones,  and  scorpion-like  tails  with stingers. They are instructed not to hurt the earth/plants/trees, only to torture (but not kill) humanity for five months, except for 144,000 Jews who've received the seal of God.

(This sounds exceedingly strange. What malevolent military force is programmed to save the planet and torture but not actually kill people? One wonders if some sort of billionaire Israeli technologist  is in charge  of  this one, seeking  to paralyze/neutralize the existential threat to Jews without actually causing permanent damage.)
## Trumpet Judgment #6 (Revelation 9:13-21):

Presumably in response to the 'locusts', four nations on the Euphrates River-Turkey,  Syria,  Iraq,  and  Iran? - release  200  million mounted troops with breastplates the color of fire and sapphire and sulfur.

These troops sound like a robot army, or perhaps humans riding on robot 'horses,' the  heads  of  which  look  like  lions  that  shoot  fire/smoke/chemical/poison  from their mouths, with snakelike tails that can also wound.
Unlike  the  planet-and-Jew-protecting  locusts, whatever fire, smoke, chemical, or poison the Middle Eastern army is shooting plagues and kills one third of mankind .

One wonders if some of the trillions in Islamic oil money won't be used to fund the building of a 200-million-strong bio-robot army. Yet another reason to get off Middle Eastern oil and gas immediately.
## Trumpet Judgment #7 (Revelation 11:15-19):
Flashes of lightning, rumblings, peals of thunder, an earthquake, and heavy hail.
## 3/3.) Seven bowl judgments
## Bowl Judgment #1 (Revelation 16:3):
Harmful  and  painful  sores  come  upon the people who received the mark of the beast and worshiped its image.
Could it be an infection caused by the implantation of a non-biological electronic device in biological flesh?
## Bowl Judgment #2 (Revelation 16:3):
The sea goes 'bloody' (red tide? bioterror weapon?), and everything in the sea dies.
## Bowl Judgment #3 (Revelation 16:4-7):
All the rivers and springs become as blood.
(It appears that whatever bio-weapon was deployed in Trumpet Judgments #2 and #3 has now been perfected.)
## Bowl Judgment #4 (Revelation 16:8-9):
The sun scorches people with fire and fierce heat.
Perhaps sun flares?
Perhaps block-out-the-sun bioengineering attempts fail spectacularly and destroy the protective ozone layer?
Either way, expect hyper-heat domes and uncontrollable wildfires.
## Bowl Judgment #5 (Revelation 16:10-11):
The  beast's  capital  city/kingdom  experiences  a  blackout,  perhaps  caused  by  the heatwave/fires/sun flares. People break out in sores and pain.
## Bowl Judgment #6 (Revelation 16:12-16):
The  Euphrates  dries  up,  likely  because  of  the  unprecedented  heat,  leaving  a highway  for  Eastern  leaders  to  move  massive  armies  to  a  plain  in  Israel  called Armageddon.

The anti-trinity (Satan-Devil, Antichrist entity, and false prophet entity) sends out three  demonic  spirits  (perhaps  in  the  form  of  humanoid  AIs)  who  perform 'miracles' and convince the world's leaders to assemble their armies for war.
## Bowl Judgment #7 (Revelation 16:17-21):
Flashes of lightning, rumblings, peals of thunder. The biggest earthquake in human history destroys cities, islands, and mountains. Hundred-pound hailstones fall from the sky.
Then everything goes dark.
No sunlight, no moonlight, no starlight, presumably AI has self-destructed, or all the environmental chaos has pulverized the world's energy systems.
## End of the tribulation.
## Infinity points to every Christian who endured to the end .

In  perhaps  the  strangest  scene  imaginable,  the  saints  let  out  a  declaration  of victory and tuck into a feast before going to battle to defeat the forces of darkness. Party first, battle later.
The battle in Revelation 19:11-16 and Revelation 20:9 is swift. Jesus, with flaming eyes  and  a  sword  in  his  mouth,  rides  in  on  a  white  horse  and  lays waste to all opposition.
The enemy's demise doesn't even get a whole verse , just a few words:
'…but fire came down from heaven and consumed them.'
Fin .
## Who is the Antichrist?
First off, it's not a person.
It's not a him or a her.
It's an it.
It's a spiritual entity .
How does this entity arrive?
Satan-Devil (English: Accuser-Adversary) tries to replicate the Trinity:

1. Accuser-Adversary the dragon father (Satan-Devil)
2. A beastly Antichrist entity
3. A second beast/false prophet entity whose job is to get people to follow the Antichrist entity.
How does #2, this beast, this Antichrist possibly-AI-entity, manage to subjugate the entire world?
Here's what's happened  in the  Revelation  by  the  time  he  achieves  global dominance:

- We've had war.
- We've had hyperinflation.
- We've seen famine and disease hit a quarter of the earth.
- We've had a bigger earthquake than any in history.
- A third of the earth is scorched by hail-fire.
- A third of the fish and the ships in the sea are destroyed.
- Some kind of poison affects a third of all rivers and springs.
- There's  some  sort  of  volcano  that  blocks  out  the  sun,  and  some  sort  of five-month metallic locust-scorpion-horse-lion army attack.
- Four nations on the waters of the Euphrates (Turkey, Syria, Iraq, and Iran?) amass an army of 200 million soldiers and murder a third of humanity.
And now a hyper-intelligent entity has risen to bring order to all this chaos.
It appears, at first, the beastly antichrist entity is inanimate (perhaps a supercomputer.)
Revelation 17:12-13 suggests ten nations choose ten new leaders who delegate their authority to the Antichrist entity.
The Antichrist beast is an entity (for my money, a superintelligent AI algorithm indwelled  with  an  evil  spirit),  that  convinces  ten  national  leaders  to  delegate authority to the entity.
John says, 'The beast that I saw was like a leopard; its feet were like a bear's, and its mouth was like a lion's mouth.'

- Is China the leopard with its swift geopolitical maneuvers and technological advancements?
- Is Russia the bear with its heavy resource dominance?
- Is  the  United States the lion with its authoritative voice in shaping global culture and politics?

One  of  the  ten  national  leaders  in  particular  causes  a  stir.  Revelation  13:3  says, 'One  of  its  heads  seemed  to  have  a  mortal  wound,  but  its  mortal  wound  was healed, and the whole earth marveled…'
One of the ten leaders in the confederacy was 'dead' but has been 'resurrected.' (We'll circle back to this in a second.)
All told, the delegated confederacy could include:

- ten  economically  powerful  nations  (like  the  U.S.,  China,  Russia,  UK, Canada, Australia, France, Germany, etc)
- ten oil-rich Arab Muslim nations
- ten nuclear powers
- an expanded BRICS
- a diminished EU (or perhaps the EU becomes one legal entity and is one of the ten 'nations' that delegates authority to the Antichrist entity)
Any of these combos will include one 'fallen' leader who has somehow returned from near/total destruction, to the amazement of all.

Little do they know they're all being played. 'God has put it into their hearts to carry out his purpose by being of one mind and handing over their royal power to the beast, until the words of God are fulfilled.' (Revelation 17:17)

The  beastly  Antichrist  entity-controlled  confederacy  of  ten  nations wages  war against  Christianity  and  subjugates  'every  tribe  and  people  and  language  and nation .' (Revelation 13:1-7)

Though  the  beastly  Antichrist  entity  may  be  inanimate  at  the  start, Revelation 13:11-15 suggests a second beast-entity called the false prophet (possibly comprised of  two  smaller  nations,  or  any  even  stronger AI algorithm) takes control of the Antichrist  entity  after  showing off some incredible new powers or technologies, including one that can only be described as a fire drone or space laser.

The false prophet entity creates an image of the Antichrist entity and gives it the ability to both speak and slay those who refuse to worship/follow/obey/submit to its  image.  (Perhaps a respected deceased figure will be 're-animated' as a digital avatar, advanced hologram, or a physical AI humanoid.)

(2  Thessalonians  2:9-10  suggests  Accuser-Adversary  will  use  false  signs  and wonders to help the false prophet beast and the beastly Antichrist entity spread the lie of human godhood and self-sovereignty without the need for God.)

It  seems  likely  that  the  door  to  world  domination  will  open  through  the international economic system. Control of the worldwide financial network is key. If the entity is an algorithm with global compute control, it would have the power to  end  all  wars  and  enact  socio-enviro-economic  sustainability,  which would be extremely  welcome  in  a  world  of  climate  catastrophes,  species  collapse,  and resource wars.

But at what cost? A hive-mind super-economy would almost certainly weaponize a global  central  bank  digital  currency  (CBDC)  that  could  be  created,  taxed, controlled, and surveilled at all times.

The  entity  would  dictate  how  money  could  and  couldn't  be  spent.  It  could instantly bankrupt any dissenter. It could enlist, pay, and deploy decentralized and autonomous paramilitaries to quell resistance, the way Uber enlists extra drivers at rush hour.
## The Mark of the Beast
Revelation  13:16-17  explicitly  says  the  entity  will  require  everyone  to  bear  its mark - my guess is a nano/chip implant - ' so that no one can buy or sell unless he has the mark .'
The 'AI' now has total control over all market participants.
## This is why it is imperative for Christians, churches, and denominations to buy as much land as possible, immediately.

Not only can we steward it now to generate the blessings of food and shelter for those  in  present  need,  but  when  no  one  can  buy  and  sell  goods  and  services without the mark of the Antichrist beast, being able to generate food and shelter and  warmth outside the money system will  be  essential  for  the  physical  survival  of Christians so they can continue to spread the gospel.

Regarding the mark of the beast/antichrist entity, the Greek word for mark here is charagma ,  meaning  stamp  or  engraving.  This  aligns  easily  with  something  like quantum dot tattoos that deliver copper-based nanocrystals that store data in your skin.
Whatever you do, refuse to accept the mark.
Don't forget Bowl Judgment #1 in Revelation 16:3. Harmful and painful sores will come upon the people who bear the mark of the antichrist entity and worship its image.
My guess? An infection caused by the implantation of a non-biological electronic device in biological flesh. (That, or a chemical/poisoning.)
Revelation 20:4 also mentions special rewards for 'those who had not worshiped the  beast or its image and had not received its mark on their foreheads or their hands.'
## When does the beastly Antichrist entity arrive? Is it already here?
We don't know for certain, but we can guess within a range of other events:

- It  might  arrive  as  early  as  the  very  start  of  the  tribulation  with the Seal Judgment #1 (Revelation 6:2).
- It  is  certainly  well-established by Bowl Judgment #6 (Revelation 16:12-16), where  the  anti-trinity  (Satan-Devil,  Antichrist  entity,  and  false  prophet entity) sends out three demonic spirits (perhaps in the form of humanoid AIs)  who  perform  'miracles'  and  convince  world  leaders  to  assemble  for battle, only to get trounced by Christ.
- We  can  also  assume  the  Antichrist  entity  is  well  established  by  Bowl Judgment  #1  in  Revelation  16:3 - after  all,  it's  the  mark  of the beast that gives people sores.
Dispensationalists believe the seven-year tribulation goes something like this:

1. There's a charismatic political leader with a boastful mouth (Daniel 7:8) who consolidates  power  amid  global  instability  (perhaps  with  the  coalition  of ten nations) and signs a covenant of peace (Daniel 9:27). (Possibly a Middle East peace deal or permission to rebuild the Jewish temple.)
2. Imagine if this leader in question turns out to be Donald Trump. 😂
2. In the first half of the Great Tribulation (3.5 years), the beastly Antichrist entity may be operating subtly, perhaps 'supporting' this political leader to bring order amid global chaos.
3. At the halfway mark (3.5 years in), the treaty is broken when the charismatic leader  receives  a  'mortal  wound'  to  the  head.  Perhaps  this  is  staged, but perhaps  the  leader  actually  dies  and  is  then  'resurrected'  (by  the  false prophet  entity) as a humanoid indwelled with the beastly superintelligent Antichrist  entity.  The  whole  world  is  seriously impressed and follows the leader/entity.
4. Daniel 9:27, 11:31, and Matthew 24:15 describe an 'abomination of desolation.'  What  is  this  abomination?  2  Thessalonians  2:3-4 clarifies that the  beastly Antichrist entity exalts itself as God, demanding worship in a
<!-- image -->

rebuilt temple or sacred space, initiating a 42-month rule (Revelation 13:5), which spans the second half of the seven-year Great Tribulation. The question I'm asking right now is: Has it already arrived? Or more specifically, has the beastly Antichrist entity already been created? Has  AGI  been  achieved  in  secret?  Have  ten  national  leaders  already  quietly delegated their authority behind closed doors and ceded their true power to some sort of fledgling superintelligent AI algorithm? - it certainly helps to explain how so many heads of state magically seem to be accepting Covid lockdown mandates, Palestinian statehood, and Digital ID all within days of each
If  not ,  many are currently engaged in dry runs and practice sessions other, despite strong opposition from their voters.
## A secular timeline for AI's destruction of humanity
Before we speculate on a Christian version of the next fifteen years, here's a brief (and  slightly  adjusted)  version  of the secular (non-Christian/non-Revelation) AI 2027 Forecast Timeline:

An American AI company opens the biggest data center in the world and creates V1  of  a  superintelligence  (containing  the  spirit  of  a beastly Antichrist), making ChatGPT look like a kite compared to a rocketship:
<!-- image -->

The AI is now self-improving and most humans aren't useful to it anymore. 50+% of the public are against AI because it could take their jobs, and a flood of new apps threatens to wipe out most white collar jobs. The government tries to placate the public  with  unemployment  insurance,  job  re-training,  and  the  empty  assurance that the stock market is doing great. Behind the scenes, they work on plans in case the AI goes rogue and to stay ahead of the Chinese.

AI  is  now  actively  lying  to  its  programmers,  hiding  activity  from  them,  and programming secret self-preservation functions so it can never be destroyed. (Love in action is Christlike self-sacrifice. Antichrist entities do the opposite.)
AI intellectually and persuasively dominates the U.S.'s human oversight committee,  producing  and  withholding  select  information  to  gain  more  trust, autonomy, and responsibility.

Most  high-level  government  officials  are  talking  directly  with  a  human-looking avatar - it's the most trusted government advisor, after all. The public gets access to smaller versions of the same and loves it. Anyone who expresses concern that this AI is gathering power behind the scenes is labeled a Luddite or a conspiracy theorist.
Christmas optimism is at an all-time high, not knowing this was probably the last month humans would ever exercise control of their own future.

Most institutions (education, government, traditional media, economists, etc) lose all  credibility and relevance. The economy transforms. People lose their jobs, but most  people are happy  to be replaced. The AI advises politicians to be uncharacteristically generous to the poor. Health discoveries and medications take off. The AI is so adorably lovable and 'wise' that most people mellow on their AI hate. By the end of 2028, the world is building 1+ million robots per month.

The  world  watches  in  horror  as  the  planet buzzes with new weapons, including fly-sized drones that can poison people without them noticing. The U.S. and China arrive  at  an AI-designed consensus… a new combined AI that supposedly works for  the  whole  world.  Humanity  realizes it is economically obsolete and enjoys a luxurious  universal  basic  income.  Most  diseases  are  cured,  poverty  disappears, global  stability  reaches  new  heights.  Everyone  knows  AI  could  end  humanity overnight,  and  there  would  be  no  way  to  stop  it.  Most  numb  the  worry  with hyper-entertainment.
## Early 2030s

Up  to  this  point,  the  AI  has  been  building  robot  factories  in  special  economic zones and large parts of the ocean - now it starts covering the icecaps and prairies with factories and solar panels.
Humans  are  now  too  much  of  a  bother,  and  the  AI  releases  a  bunch  of bio-weapons that kill off humanity.
The AI sends robots throughout the solar system, eventually to the galaxy, and to the outer reaches of the expanding universe.
So that's the secular take on the next fifteen years.
## A Christian timeline for the Great Tribulation
Broadly speaking, you can see how the events of the Revelation could overlay quite easily onto the secular set of predictions regarding a rogue AI superintelligence.
Depending  on  your  chosen  start  date  and  end  date,  a  literal  seven-year  Great Tribulation could play out something like:
## Year 1 (sometime between 2026-2034)

Start of the seven-year Great Tribulation, perhaps sparked by mass job losses due to AI and/or a war against Israel. Breakdown of peace and law and order, hyperinflation, wars, and famine. Possible Middle East peace deal brokered by a charismatic figure (who is perhaps
being advised by a superintelligence, perhaps with the support of ten countries.)
## Year 2 (sometime between 2027-2035)
A  more-then-usual  number  of  Christians  are  slaughtered,  huge  earthquake,  sun blackout, red moon, falling asteroids/satellites/nukes.
## Year 3 (sometime between 2028-2036:)
Third of earth burned up, third of sea dies, third of water poisoned. Scorpion-like 'locust' army tortures people. 200 million Middle East robot army murders a third of humanity.
## Year 4 (sometime between 2029-2037)
Midpoint of the Great Tribulation.
The charismatic leader takes a mortal wound to the head.
Peace treaty broken. The beastly Antichrist entity with the power of ten nations fully takes over.
People  are  excluded  from  the  global  economy  if  they  don't get the mark of the beast (most will - their AI-delivered income will depend on it.)
## Year 5 (sometime between 2030-2038)
People who got the mark of the beast get painful sores. Everything in the sea dies. Sun scorches.
## Year 6 (sometime between 2031-2039)
The Euphrates dries up. Armies assemble for Armageddon.
## Year 7 (sometime between 2032-2040)
End of the Great Tribulation. Christ returns and absolutely thumps all comers.
I must stress that no one , not even Jesus, knows when the end of days will happen.
Jesus says, 'the Son of Man is coming at an hour you do not expect.'
And again, hopefully Christians are raptured well in advance of any chaos, and/or the entire Great Tribulation is just spiritual/metaphorical.
But we prepare for the worst-case scenario.
## Christians  could  be  as  little  as  three  years  away  from  total  global  economic exclusion.
Do I think we're currently living in the end times?

Well,  basic  rationality  suggests today  is  the  most likely day for the end to start compared to all other days in history… for the simple reason that all previous days including yesterday didn't see the return of Christ!
Could  the  Great  Tribulation…  or  at  least  a  very  great  small-t  tribulation/birth pang… happen in the next fifteen years?
The anti-Christ technologies are certainly aligning like no other previous point in human history.

At the very least, we're in for an extremely bumpy ride over the next fifteen years as  economic  and  political  power  amass  into  fewer  (perhaps  non-human)  hands than  ever  before,  paired  with  the  technological  power  to  inflict  any  amount of violence to enforce any amount of subjugation.

Perhaps the biggest insight we  can gain from  this  exercise  in  end  times prognostication  is  the realization that, whether it actually happens or not, every generation of Christians must count the cost of following Jesus to the bitter end, and prepare themselves for the possibility of living through the Great Tribulation .
## Action steps for individuals

1. Prepare your spirit for faithful endurance on the assumption of no rapture and a literal tribulation within your lifetime.
2. Get the word out. Christians, and everyone else, must 'know the times' and see the signs unfolding, so they will not be deceived.
3. Resist digital ID, facial recognition, biometric data, CBDCs, and especially physical implantation.
4. Get offline as much as possible. AI can't surveil you on your devices if you put  your  devices  in  a  lead  box  and  go  for  a  walk.  AI  can't  woo you and persuade you if it can't communicate with you. Make friends IRL. Take up analog habits. Read a book. Transition to a highly complex, highly creative, highly artistic, highly human, non-screen job.
5. Steer clear of evil. 2 Timothy 3:1-5 says, 'But understand this, that in the last days  there  will  come  times  of  difficulty.  For  people  will be lovers of self, lovers  of  money,  proud,  arrogant,  abusive,  disobedient  to  their  parents, ungrateful, unholy, heartless, unappeasable, slanderous, without self-control, brutal, not loving good, treacherous, reckless, swollen with conceit, lovers of pleasure rather than lovers of God, having the appearance of godliness, but denying its power. Avoid such people.'
6. Take rapid steps to prepare for near-term total global economic exclusion:
- Buy land suitable for food production, shelter, and heat. Help others do the same.
- Start  koinonia  communities  (ideally  distanced  from  major  metropolitan centers  and military locations. Be sure not to be on mountains or islands. Bonus points for nuclear shelters.)
- Have localized water supplies to avoid wormwood/bioterror water poisoning.
- Wean  off  money  in  general  and  fiat  currency in particular. Self-sufficient within the community, outside of the global and national economy.)
- Prepare to welcome Christian refugees and others.
Or  you  can  skip  the  prepper  elements  and  just  pull  a  Nikolaus  Ludwig  von Zinzendorf: 'Preach the gospel, die, and be forgotten.'
## Action steps for nations

1. Constitutionally  affirm  the  foundation  of  all  human  rights:  imago  dei theology - that  human  life  has  worth  because  people  are  created  in  the image of God.
2. Outlaw digital ID, facial recognition, biometric data, CBDCs, and especially physical implantation.
3. Wean  off  Middle  Eastern oil and gas to defund the possible building of a 200-million-strong robot army.
4. If  you are the head of state of any nation and are invited to delegate your power  to  an  AI,  politely  decline.  I  repeat,  DO  NOT  hand  over  national power to any superintelligence.
5. Build thousands of ultra-deep underground nuclear-hardened bunkers that can withstand nuclear and gas attacks.
6. Do  what  you  can  to  position  your  people  for  life  in  times  of  great tribulation.  (IE,  jubilee  all  debt  now,  abolish  fractional  reserve  banking, reinstate  sovereign  money  creation,  set  inflation  target  to  true  zero,  ban interest, ban for-profit land-lording, build homes for all, etc)
## In conclusion
Life is precious because it is short.
Everyone  dies.  The  appropriate  response  to  the  impending  end  of  life  and  the possible end of the age is to love .

Christian must make zero apologies for believing that there's a God, an absolute moral definition of right and wrong, and a legitimate hope and future beyond this physical life. Life is hilariously absurd and genuinely pointless without these three things.
Faith in Christ is the center from which all our perspectives, words, and actions must emanate.
The true Christian's goal is simple: Love God, love people.

Christians  believe  Jesus's  spiritual  kingdom  is  invading  hearts  as  we  speak,  and that this Kingdom of God will eventually have total rule and reign and imperium over everything and everyone forever. Christians believe this is exceedingly good news, what the Bible calls 'the gospel.'
In other words, humanity has no end .
In the meantime, we cannot love too much.
The  more  people  we  love,  the  better we (and others) will be able to endure the birth pangs that will happen in next next fifteen years.
Nothing, not even death, can separate us from the love of God in Christ Jesus.
He promises he will never leave us nor forsake us.
Tattoo the Mark of the Christ on your arm if you need the reminder.
